arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for managing and accessing the EFS access point

file_system_arn.description: ARN of the associated EFS file system for referencing in policies and configurations

id.description: Unique identifier of the EFS access point for resource management

owner_id.description: AWS account ID of the owner for identifying resource ownership

tags_all.description: Consolidated list of tags applied to the EFS access point for organization and filtering
